segments.original_text: もうネオ選手側としても

segments.text: they're in a position where they don't have to commit much
segments.original_text: かなり付き合わなくてもいい状態でありますからね

segments.text: As long as they can build up even a little bit of percent
segments.original_text: 少しでもパーセントさえ稼いでしまえばといったところですが
ピクミン投擲に対して

segments.text: Even against the purple one, full hop gets there
segments.original_text: 紫に対しても大ジャンプから

full_text: Fall back And for Neo's side too they're in a position where they don't have to commit much Yeah As long as they can build up even a little bit of percent Against Pikmin throws Even against the purple one, full hop gets there

corrections.rule: character name: Olimar's Pikmin = ピクミン
